calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-22-2019 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Sean Dolan, Plaintiff/Respondent 742A Portola Street, San Francisco, CA. 94129 (415) 992-1559
Nicole Rosecrans, Defendant/Appellant 1496 Moray Ct. Park City, UT. 84060 (435) 640-0996

Sean Dolan testifies on behalf of the Plaintiff/Respondent. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit #1 - Red binder containing rent/bill/notifications, receipts and bills
Exhibit #2 - Blue binder containing all correspondence with Nicole Rosecrans beginning from April 17, 2017.

Nicole Rosecrans testifies on behalf of the Defendant/Appellant. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit A: Print-out of Float Spa Gift Card Purchase
Exhibit B: E-mail from Mr.Dolan to Ms. Rosecrans requesting a trial continuance due to his injury

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

All exhibits retained by the Court for review.

Judge Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: R. Gumpal, Not Reported, (505).

***The Court issues his ruling in favor of the Plaintiff/Respondent. Judgment is affirmed.

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar May-22-2019 Set For Trial On May-22-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 505

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-22-2019 Continued To May-22-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Sean Dolan Plaintiff/Respondent.
Nicole Rosecrans Defendant/Appellant.

The Appellant does not stipulate to a hearing before the Judge Pro Tem. The matter is reassigned to the department of the Presiding Judge. The Presiding Judge assigns the matter to Dept. 505 before the Honorable Judge Harold Khan. Judge Pro Tem: Anne Wong, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D525)

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Mar-22-2019 Granted With Continuance

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Mar-22-2019 Judgment Entered

Off Calendar Feb-01-2019 Judgment Entered
